Lion Dance

Lion Dance Performances

Leopards: Beginner 7-12 years oldScheduleContact UsContact Us Here

Performances Concord Kung Fu Academy Lion Dance Team performs at many local functions and events.

Performances:

Chinese New Year Parade - San Francisco - 2023 Lunar New Year Celebration - Santana Row, San Jose - 2023, 2024.

2025 Chinese New Year Celebration - Just Dance Ballroom, Oakland - 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2023, 2024, 2025 Chinese New Year Celebration - Vista Grande Middle School, Danville - 2018, 2019, 2020, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025 Chinese New Year Celebration - Murwood Elementary School, Walnut Creek - 2018, 2020, 2023, 2024 Chinese New Year Celebration - Manor Elementary School, Fairfax - 2024 Chinese New Year Celebration - Aegis Senior Living - 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2023, 2025 Chinese New Year Celebration - Waterford at Rossmoor - 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020 Chinese New Year Celebration - City of Hercules Senior Center - 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020 Chinese New Year Celebration - Orinda Library - 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2025 Chinese New Year Celebration -
